_comment: Registration source for piggyback.py. One entry per hook script. To add a new script: drop the file in the repo, add an entry here, then run `piggyback register <name>`. 'script' is relative to the repo root (the dir holding piggyback.py). 'scope' decides which settings.json gets the hook: global = ~/.claude/settings.json (every project), repo = ./.claude/settings.json (current repo only). Each hook = one Claude Code event + matcher; a script may register several.
